title: Korean-Italian Pancakes with Doenjang Sauce
description: A unique fusion dish featuring crispy Korean-style pancakes topped with a savory doenjang sauce, all inspired by Italian flavors.

ingredients.name: pancakes mix
ingredients.notes: use as a substitute for flour

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together flour, cornstarch, and korean chili flakes.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together doenjang, toasted sesame oil, and eggs.
3. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until just combined.
4. Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
5. Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter into the pan and cook until bubbles appear on the surface.
6. Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
7. Serve the pancakes hot with doenjang sauce drizzled on top.
8. To make the doenjang sauce, blend doenjang, toasted sesame oil, and water in a blender until smooth.
9. Season the sauce with salt to taste.
10. Serve the pancakes with doenjang sauce and garnish with toasted sesame seeds if desired.
